name: Boat Workshop
unlockCondition: 6,000,000 ducats capital, Boat Builders Guild connection, water access
calculationsAnalysis: The Boat Workshop represents specialized maritime production with modest returns. The construction cost of 2,000,000 ducats reflects the specialized equipment and waterfront facilities required, while the income of 25,000 ducats (1.25% return) represents sales of various watercraft. The maintenance cost of 20,000 ducats (80% of income) creates a modest profit margin appropriate for specialized production. The employment capacity of 8 represents the boat builders, apprentices, and assistants needed. The construction time of 5 days (432000000ms) reflects the specialized construction requirements. This building creates a strategic investment in transportation infrastructure that supports Venice's unique water-based mobility needs.
shortDescription: Specialized workshop for building and repairing small watercraft for Venice's canals and lagoon.
fullDescription: Essential to Venice's water-based transportation system, boat workshops construct and maintain the diverse fleet of small vessels that navigate the city's canals. Featuring covered construction areas, specialized tools, wood steaming equipment, and direct water access, these facilities combine traditional craftsmanship with practical functionality. From simple sandoli to elegant gondolas, these workshops produce the watercraft that define Venetian mobility.
flavorText: In a city where streets are made of water, the boat builder is as essential as the baker—for while one feeds the body, the other enables every aspect of Venetian life to flow.

locationRequirements.adjacentRequirements: Canal or lagoon frontage, boat launching capability
locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Moderate noise, wood dust, increased water traffic

constructionPhase3DPrompt: Renaissance Venetian boat workshop under construction, specialized maritime production facility, covered building area taking shape with open sides for ventilation, timber storage racks, specialized tool installation, wood steaming equipment, boat molds and templates, small slipway for launching vessels, direct canal access, craftsman workbenches, pitch heating area with safety features, isometric game perspective, stylized but detailed, focus on traditional boatbuilding craftsmanship combined with practical water access
completedBuilding3DPrompt: Completed Renaissance Venetian boat workshop, active maritime production facility featuring covered main work area with boats in various stages of construction, master boat builder directing apprentices, specialized tools for shaping wooden hulls, steam box for bending wood, pitch pot for waterproofing, timber storage organized by type and age, small slipway for launching completed vessels, boats being caulked and sealed, gondola taking shape on specialized frame, historically accurate but slightly stylized for game aesthetic, isometric game perspective, sense of traditional craftsmanship, wood shavings on floor, partially completed vessels showing construction techniques, small dock where customers examine finished boats, atmosphere combining craftsmanship with maritime practicality

upgradePath: Advanced Boat Workshop (larger vessels, higher efficiency)

soundDesign.ambientSound: Wood being worked, hammering, water lapping against hulls
soundDesign.activitySounds: Sawing, planing, steam box hissing, boat launching

seasonalEffects.summer: Peak production season, outdoor finishing work

name: Porter Guild Hall
calculationsAnalysis: The Porter Guild Hall represents specialized transportation infrastructure with modest service income. The construction cost of 1,500,000 ducats reflects the facilities required for organizing porter services, while the income of 18,000 ducats (1.2% return) represents fees and commissions from coordinating porter activities. The maintenance cost of 15,000 ducats (83.3% of income) creates a modest profit margin appropriate for service infrastructure. The employment capacity of 25 represents the porters, dispatchers, and administrators needed. The construction time of 4 days (345600000ms) reflects the straightforward construction requirements. This building creates a strategic investment in land-based transportation that complements Venice's water transport system.
shortDescription: Organizational center for Venice's professional porters who transport goods through the city's pedestrian streets.
fullDescription: Coordinating Venice's essential land-based transportation network, porter guild halls organize the professional carriers who navigate the city's bridges and narrow streets. Featuring dispatch areas, equipment storage, rest facilities, and administrative offices, these buildings support the organized movement of goods throughout Venice. In a city where wheeled transport is impossible due to countless stairs and bridges, professional porters provide the critical link between water transport and final destinations.
flavorText: The gondola may be Venice's symbol, but it is the humble porter who completes every journey—for what arrives by water must ultimately be carried by human strength to its final destination.

locationRequirements.districtRestrictions: Commercial districts, near markets or cargo landings
locationRequirements.adjacentRequirements: Access to main pedestrian routes, proximity to goods sources
locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Increased foot traffic, temporary goods storage, activity hub

constructionPhase3DPrompt: Renaissance Venetian porter guild hall under construction, transportation service facility, main dispatch hall taking shape, equipment storage areas, rest facilities for porters between assignments, administrative offices for coordinating deliveries, cargo staging area, specialized equipment racks for carrying devices, guild record keeping area, route planning station, isometric game perspective, stylized but detailed, focus on creating functional transportation hub for the human-powered logistics of Venice
completedBuilding3DPrompt: Completed Renaissance Venetian porter guild hall, bustling transportation hub featuring central dispatch area where assignments are distributed, porters with specialized carrying equipment coming and going with goods, equipment storage with various carrying poles and harnesses, administrative office with delivery records and pricing charts, rest area where off-duty porters wait for assignments, cargo staging zone where goods are organized by destination, guild officials supervising operations, porter's guild emblem prominently displayed, historically accurate but slightly stylized for game aesthetic, isometric game perspective, sense of organized logistics activity, porters carrying diverse loads from barrels to furniture, atmosphere of constant movement and coordination, route maps on walls showing city districts

upgradePath: Expanded Porter Network (faster service, higher capacity)

soundDesign.ambientSound: Porters discussing routes, equipment being moved, assignment calls
soundDesign.activitySounds: Cargo being organized, delivery dispatches, fee negotiations
